pilot_framework: All pilots use samples=100, seeds=[42], timeout=900s unless noted
revision_note: Updated 2026-04-03 to reflect iteration-1 hypothesis revisions and pilot completion status

pilot_tier0.result: 2.68% spread across 6 orderings, ResNet-18/CIFAR-10 5k, 10 epochs, 2 seeds. CJ→Crop→Flip best (28.04%), Flip→CJ→Crop worst (25.36%). Decision: GO.

tier1_pilot_all_blocks.result: 3/4 blocks with spread>0.5%: resnet18/cifar10=0.96%, resnet18/cifar100=0.88%, vit/cifar10=2.32%. vit/cifar100=0.25% (cautious). All results: 1 seed, 10 epochs, 100-sample subsets.

tier2_category_ordering_pilot.result: interleaved_PG=0.2939, all_geo_first=0.2038, spread=9.01%. Single seed, 5k samples, 10 epochs. STRIKING but needs confirmation at 30 epochs.

tier3_magnitude_pilot.result: M5=0.35%, M9=0.88%, M14=0.00%. Inverted-U shape (H6) supported by pilot. Single seed only.

tier4a_nc_pixel_pilot.result: rho=-0.20, p=0.68 — pixel-space NC_2 FALSIFIED (100 samples in 3072-D). Feature-space test required.

tier4b_infonce_pilot.result: rho=+0.54 (CIFAR-10) and rho=-0.66 (CIFAR-100), both non-significant. Underpowered encoder (10 epochs). Full-scale required.

baselines_pilots.result: All 5 baselines trained at pilot scale. RandAugment N=2 M=9 performs best. Used for sanity; full-scale required for paper.

tier2_confirmation_pilot.purpose: Gate before full Tier 2 investment. Validate whether the 9.01% category-ordering effect persists at 30 epochs and 2 seeds. Pilot (10 epochs, 5k, 1 seed) is insufficient statistical basis for a 100-run investment.

pass_criteria.primary: interleaved_PG spread vs. all_geo_first > 1.0% on CIFAR-10/ResNet-18 (either seed)
pass_criteria.infrastructure: All 5 orderings instantiate correctly with GaussianBlur and RandomRotation

decision_logic.proceed_cautiously: Spread 0.5-1%: reduce full Tier 2 to 3 seeds instead of 5
decision_logic.redirect_budget: Spread < 0.5% in both seeds: report pilot as preliminary, redirect budget to additional Tier 1 analysis (more seeds or ViT instability investigation)

tier1_resnet18_cifar10_full_pilot.purpose: 10-epoch sanity pass before committing 5-seed x 200-epoch run. Verifies full-dataset training pipeline (50k samples), checkpoint saving, and per-epoch logging at production scale.
tier1_resnet18_cifar10_full_pilot.pass_criteria: All 6 orderings run 10 epochs without error; checkpoint saved; per-epoch val_accuracy logged; spread > 0.0%

tier4a_feature_nc_pilot.purpose: Verify feature extraction pipeline from pretrained ResNet-18 works before 10k-sample full run. 100 samples is sufficient for pipeline validation.
tier4a_feature_nc_pilot.pass_criteria: Feature extraction returns 512-D tensors; SWD computed for at least 1 pair; NC_2 > 0; no CUDA OOM

global_pass_criteria.tier1_full_go_criterion: In pilot: all 6 orderings complete for all 4 blocks; spread > 0.0% in at least 3 blocks
global_pass_criteria.tier2_go_criterion: tier2_confirmation_pilot primary pass: spread > 1% on CIFAR-10/ResNet-18
global_pass_criteria.tier3_go_criterion: Best and worst orderings from tier1_analysis_full available; both orderings' accuracies differ by > 0.3%
global_pass_criteria.tier4_go_criterion: Tier 1 ResNet-18/CIFAR-10 200-epoch checkpoint available at expected path
